benefits.description: Weight loss with visible progress; belt notches tightened by 3-4, clothes fitting better
Muscle preservation during fat loss at 4mg/week dose
Increased energy level, more active without willpower needed

protocol_notes: Reconstitution method: 1ml bacteriostatic water per 10mg vial to create 1mg/0.1ml ratio matching insulin syringe calibrations. Started 2mg/week for 1 month, planned escalation to 4-6mg/week. 2.5 months into protocol. Reported that 4mg appears to be personal sweet spot; noted 8mg increases fat loss rate but may reduce muscle mass. User advocates for 6mg as potential balance based on glucagon-induced fat-burning mechanism.
